hooks.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "TDD RULES (non-negotiable):
1. RED FIRST — write a failing test before any implementation. If the test passes before implementation exists, the test is wrong.
2. ONE TEST AT A TIME — write one failing test, make it green, then move to the next.
3. MINIMUM IMPLEMENTATION — make the test pass with the simplest possible code. No untested code.
4. REFACTOR ONLY ON GREEN — never refactor on red.
5. NO \`any\` TYPES — TypeScript strict mode is on. Stop and type it properly.
6. COVERAGE GATES — Lines ≥ 80%, Functions ≥ 80%, Branches ≥ 70%.
7. TESTS NEXT TO SOURCE — src/routes/foo.ts → src/routes/foo.test.ts.
8. REAL TEST DB — no mocking Prisma. Use DATABASE_URL_TEST.
9. FACTORY FUNCTIONS — use createTestFirm(), createTestClient(), etc. No static fixtures.
10. MOCK ONLY EXTERNAL SERVICES — S3, Resend, Stripe. Never mock Prisma or your own services."}'
